textByHash.92922858896a773c5af46c876305f01441f7b0a3: I'm not alone! Me and my mates run these streets. You'd better watch your pockets, stranger.
textByHash.47f5e1341d3ff3ddcb50e582f25540539ca38b99: We keep a lookout to see when the owners leave and come back. Once they're out, we can break in and steal all their stuff!
textByHash.5bf5774f7425ea09b281c1d9e84e33c6ed896971: No one suspects us street urchins. Hidden in plain sight, as they say.
textByHash.b0da03835f16f8676f09c28443b089968ab09922: I can give you some info on which houses are free if you like...
textByHash.3c50b2d618912db0d79fe9890ef76cd4733580c2: Hello. Have you met our crew leader yet?
textByHash.ff543ae9baa1b5ed09f1a35becef47540fc23bf5: Go chat to them! They should be near the bank... naturally.
textByHash.1932c2b578040c15623ed55f2b0f30d94ecb399c: You don't have any house keys, do you? You won't find yourself getting very far without any. Maybe come back later?
textByHash.72c69f2da5919f1c51fc5e86af11262e578974a2: Hello. A fine day for stealing, wouldn't you say?
